name: Honey-Wheat Pumpkin Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Combine pumpkin, milk, butter, honey, and egg in a bowl, mixing well.
3. In a separate bowl, combine flours, sugar, baking powder, salt, and nuts. Stir until just moistened.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the pumpkin mixture until just combined.
5. Spoon batter into greased medium-sized muffin pans, filling each cup about half full.
6. Bake for 15 minutes.
